name: io.github.vitas/evidra-lock
title: Evidra-Lock
description: Fail-closed policy guardrails for AI agents running kubectl, terraform, helm, and argocd.

environmentVariables.description: Enable deny-loop prevention cache for agent/CI actors
environmentVariables.name: EVIDRA_DENY_CACHE

environmentVariables.description: Environment label for policy evaluation (e.g. production, staging)
environmentVariables.name: EVIDRA_ENVIRONMENT

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token for API authentication (e.g. Bearer ev1_...)
